candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept directly.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost component.
Not revenue; cost line.
Not revenue; cost component.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.
Liability, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected explicit revenue total from candidate list. Although 'Net sales' also matches concept, rule prefers candidate list whenever possible and later code can use this as the single reported revenue line.

candidates.why: Direct cost line for services sold; best semantic match to COGS/cost of sales.
Underlying component/older-detail row, but less preferred than the main direct cost line.
Also matches COGS, but appears to be a broader/relabelled total duplicating cost of services sold.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Excluded because it is D&A component, not total COGS.
Excluded because it is depreciation component, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Chose the direct production/service cost row. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' has identical values in shown years, suggesting duplication/relabeling; prefer the more specific operating cost label.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component: selling overhead.
Sub-component/alternate detail of selling expenses; less preferred when main row exists.
Clear SG&A component: administrative overhead.
Sub-component/alternate detail of administrative expenses; less preferred when main row exists.
Can be overhead bucket, though may mix non-SG&A items; acceptable supplemental SG&A component when no explicit SG&A total exists.
Same concept but mostly sparse/duplicate variant.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is present. Selected operating overhead components and excluded depreciation-specific rows, R&D, COGS, and totals/balancing rows. Used 'Other operating expenses' as supplemental overhead bucket; avoided duplicate/capitalization variants and '- other' subdetail rows because main component rows exist.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.
Only depreciation component of R&D, not full R&D expense.
Underlying detail/alternate row, less preferred than main R&D line.
Broad finance cost line, usable only if specific interest expense unavailable.
Explicit interest expense line; preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred as primary consolidated interest expense.
Residual component label; avoid when explicit interest expense exists.
Broad non-interest finance items may be included; not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent only.

variables.notes: Priority list: use explicit 'Interest Expense' first; fall back to broader 'Financial Expenses' only where the explicit line may be missing.

candidates.why: Generic equity label but values are not shown; less preferred than attributable-to-parent equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Total equity includes NCI where present; only fallback if owner/parent equity unavailable.
Balancing item, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list prefers parent-shareholders equity to exclude NCI. Included 'Total equity' as fallback for years where parent-attributable line may be unavailable.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Income statement allocation line, less preferred than balance sheet NCI.
Income statement OCI/allocation line, less preferred than balance sheet line.
Preferred balance sheet NCI line.
Alternative balance sheet NCI label; acceptable fallback.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority list. This avoids mixing income statement attribution lines with balance sheet equity components.
